session.user: Run `make fast-ci` in /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report all results including any failures. Do not fix anything, just report what passes and what fails.
session.assistant: I'll run `make fast-ci` in the erk repository and report all results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci target and capture all output

session.assistant:
All tests passed! Here's a summary of the `make fast-ci` results:
## Fast CI Results - ALL PASSING
**Linting & Code Quality:** - `ruff check` - All checks passed - `ruff format` - 1742 files already formatted - `prettier` - All matched files use Prettier code style - `ty` (type checker) - All checks passed
**Tests:** - **Unit Tests (erk)** - 5867 passed in 14.89s - **Tests (erk-dev)** - 138 passed in 6.07s - **Tests (erk-statusline)** - 123 passed in 0.86s - **Tests (erk-mcp)** - 50 passed
**Documentation & Configuration:** - Exec Reference Check - `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` is up to date - AGENTS.md standard check - PASSED - CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md pairing - All properly paired (19 files checked, 0 violations)
**Total test count:** 6,178 tests passed across all test suites with no failures.
